ads_txt_implementation.method: Next.js App Router route handler (src/app/ads.txt/route.ts) + public/ads.txt

readiness_audit.footer_links: ✅ Footer links to privacy, terms, cookies, editorial policy
readiness_audit.real_content: ✅ Calculator pages have 5000+ bytes of real content

what_qasem_should_do.ads_txt_done: ads.txt is live. AdSense will auto-detect it on next crawl (usually within hours).
what_qasem_should_do.no_manual_action: Do NOT click 'Request Review' or any button in AdSense. It will update automatically.
what_qasem_should_do.wait_time: AdSense typically takes 1-3 days to detect ads.txt and update status.
what_qasem_should_do.no_clicks: Do NOT click your own ads. Do NOT use VPN/proxy to test. AdSense detects artificial clicks.
what_qasem_should_do.approval_process: AdSense reviews: (1) ads.txt found, (2) content quality, (3) policy pages, (4) traffic. All requirements are met.

compliance.no_ads_added: ✅ No ad units or auto ads code added to the site
